title: JAKY-Global Large Clear Glass Vase Ribbed Tall Clear Vase Flower Vase 21cm Decorative Vases for Home Table Centerpieces Flowers Decor and Farmhouse, H-21CM
features: This large glass vase is perfect for centerpiece decoration. The vase filler not included, this thickened bottle-shaped glass vase boasts a height of 8.0" and diameter of 5.5".

Add elegance to your living space with this tall glass vase. Perfect for various types of flowers and decorative accents, this flexible vase is also suitable for candles and storage. It comes in a sturdy packaging to avoid damage during transportation.

Elevate your decor with this unique farmhouse glass vase. Its ribbed design and round smooth mouth make it an attractive centerpiece on any table. Its thickened body ensures that it does not shake when placed on a surface. Perfect for different types of flowers, candles and storage.

4 colors to choose from, clear, black gray, amber, colored .Create a unique statement with this iridescent vase. Its attractive design and right size make it suitable for most flowers, candles and centerpieces. Use it for wedding events or home decor to add a touch of sophistication.

This gold floor vase is the perfect statement piece for any room. Its rich color and sleek design make it an attractive centerpiece. Use it for dried flowers, propagated plants or long stem artificial flowers. It comes carefully packaged for safe transportation.
